steps.title: Compare percent decreases
steps.content: The task asks how the United Kingdom's decline compares with declines in other countries. Percent decrease is the relevant measure because it compares proportional change across countries.

steps.title: Use the table rankings
steps.content: A reverses the comparison with Germany and Australia. C switches from percent decrease to absolute hours. D falsely says the United Kingdom's hours rose. The table shows the United Kingdom declined less than Germany but more than Australia and Mexico. The answer is B.
